text.title: Solo Launch Day — Output Contract
text.summary: Schema for the per-launch execution log + rollback decision log.

forbidden.pattern: pre_checks.smoke_t_minus_2h is null OR returned errors AND announce_at proceeded as planned
pre_checks.stripe_verify_charge_id is null AND product is paid
infrastructure change recorded between T-2h and T+12h that is NOT a rollback action
checkpoints missing T+15m, T+1h, T+4h, T+12h, or T+24h checkpoint
rollback action listed without "reverted_at" or "outcome" field

allowed-transformations.transformation: Compress checkpoints to T+15m, T+1h, T+6h, T+24h for shorter launch windows (free product, etc.).
Add channel-specific checkpoints (e.g. Product Hunt page-rank check at T+2h).
Note alternative announce times (e.g. mailing-list first, social at T+30m) per pre-agreed schedule.

list.item: Both smoke tests run; results captured
Stripe live swap done ≥2h before announce; verify charge id recorded
Fallback content paths exist and tested
